title: Business Information Model Concept-Domain Network
description: Production schema for flattened Data Concept to Data Domain mappings with complete governance metadata. Supports ERD generation, viewpoint filtering, and domain-based navigation.

description.description: Human-readable description of the mapping purpose and scope

source.description: Source identifier or document reference (e.g., 'Business Information Model')

generated_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the mapping was generated

stats.description: Comprehensive statistics about the concept-domain network

unique_concepts.description: Count of unique Data Concepts mapped to domains

avg_concepts_per_domain.description: Average number of concepts per domain

hierarchical_relationships.description: Count of concept grouping relationships (concept->concept or concept->domain)

mappings.description: Array of concept-to-domain mappings with complete governance metadata

concept_asset_type.description: Asset type of the concept (e.g., Data Concept, Data Element)

domain_asset_type.description: Asset type of the domain (e.g., Data Domain)

information_confidentiality_classificati.description: Data classification level (Public, Internal, Confidential, Highly Confidential, Restricted)

parent_concept_name.description: Name of parent concept if this concept is grouped by another concept

child_concepts.description: Names of child concepts grouped by this concept

domain_index.description: Index of domains with concept counts for quick lookup and validation

concept_count.description: Number of concepts in this domain

concepts.description: List of concept names in this domain

confidentiality_levels.description: Unique confidentiality classifications in this domain
